flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Houston-Victoria fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 2.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Houston-Victoria rose 74% between 2021 and 2024 (8.1% → 14.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Houston-Victoria rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (21.8% → 26.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Houston-Victoria fell 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($21.5k → $19.0k).
